segments.text: Therefore, I urge you, brothers and sisters, in view of God's mercy, to offer your bodies as a living sacrifice, holy and pleasing to God—this is your true and proper worship.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind. Then you will be able to test and approve what God's will is—his good, pleasing and perfect will.
segments.speaker: Paul

verses.title: Humble Service in the Body of Christ

segments.text: Do not think of yourself more highly than you ought, but rather think of yourself with sober judgment, in accordance with the faith God has distributed to each of you.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For just as each of us has one body with many members, and these members do not all have the same function,
so in Christ we, though many, form one body, and each member belongs to all the others.
We have different gifts, according to the grace given to each of us. If your gift is prophesying, then prophesy in accordance with your faith;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: if it is serving, then serve; if it is teaching, then teach;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: if it is to encourage, then give encouragement; if it is giving, then give generously; if it is to lead, do it diligently; if it is to show mercy, do it cheerfully.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Love must be sincere. Hate what is evil; cling to what is good.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Be devoted to one another in love. Honor one another above yourselves.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Never be lacking in zeal, but keep your spiritual fervor, serving the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Be joyful in hope, patient in affliction, faithful in prayer.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Share with the Lord's people who are in need. Practice hospitality.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Bless those who persecute you; bless and do not curse.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Rejoice with those who rejoice; mourn with those who mourn.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Live in harmony with one another. Do not be proud, but be willing to associate with people of low position. Do not be conceited.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Do not repay anyone evil for evil. Be careful to do what is right in the eyes of everyone.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: If it is possible, as far as it depends on you, live at peace with everyone.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Do not take revenge, my dear friends, but leave room for God's wrath,
It is mine to avenge; I will repay,
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: If your enemy is hungry, feed him; if he is thirsty, give him something to drink. In doing this, you will heap burning coals on his head.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Do not be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
segments.speaker: Paul
